scripts.format: biome format --files-ignore-unknown=true --write apps packages infra scripts test package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.typecheck.json tsconfig.eslint.json biome.json eslint.config.js
scripts.format:check: biome check --files-ignore-unknown=true --formatter-enabled=true --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false apps packages infra scripts test package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.typecheck.json tsconfig.eslint.json biome.json eslint.config.js
scripts.lint: biome lint --files-ignore-unknown=true --diagnostic-level=warn --error-on-warnings apps packages infra scripts test package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.typecheck.json tsconfig.eslint.json biome.json eslint.config.js && eslint "apps/**/*.ts" "packages/**/*.ts" "infra/**/*.ts" "test/**/*.ts" "eslint.config.js"
scripts.lint:fix: biome lint --files-ignore-unknown=true --diagnostic-level=warn --error-on-warnings --write apps packages infra scripts test package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.typecheck.json tsconfig.eslint.json biome.json eslint.config.js && eslint --fix "apps/**/*.ts" "packages/**/*.ts" "infra/**/*.ts" "test/**/*.ts" "eslint.config.js"
scripts.quality:fix: pnpm format && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint
scripts.quality:check: pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint
scripts.cell:up: env DOCKER_BUILDKIT=0 COMPOSE_DOCKER_CLI_BUILD=0 docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.yaml up -d --build --wait
scripts.cell:up:local: env DOCKER_BUILDKIT=0 COMPOSE_DOCKER_CLI_BUILD=0 docker compose --env-file .env.local -f infra/docker/compose.yaml up -d --build --wait
